dipole-freesp-rp-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference; RP table support)

external_reference_candidate.source: nec2c 1.3.1 on Arch Linux (deck copy with RP integer field normalized)

dipole-freesp-rp-51seg.status: Regression reference locks RP execution path and radiation-pattern table contract; nec2c external pattern samples captured for parity tracking

dipole-xaxis-rp-grid-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole rotated onto the x-axis, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz, RP theta/phi grid
dipole-xaxis-rp-grid-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference; multi-phi RP grid support)

external_reference_candidate.source: nec2c 1.3.1 on Arch Linux (deck copy with RP integer field normalized)

dipole-xaxis-rp-grid-51seg.status: Regression reference locks multi-phi RP table support on a non-z-axis dipole; nec2c external pattern samples captured for parity tracking

dipole-freesp-gm-inplace-shifted.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, generated by applying GM in-place translation to the baseline deck
dipole-freesp-gm-inplace-shifted.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference; GM in-place translation validated against baseline free-space dipole)
dipole-freesp-gm-inplace-shifted.status: Regression reference matches dipole-freesp-51seg exactly; added to lock GM in-place translation into corpus validation

dipole-ground-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, 10 m AGL, perfect ground, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz
dipole-ground-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallén solver with GN=1 PEC image-method ground (regression)

external_reference_candidate.source: nec2c 1.3.1 on Arch Linux (deck copy with XQ appended)

dipole-ground-51seg.status: GN=1 PEC image-method support active; regression-gated in CI. External reference candidate captured via nec2c 1.3.1 with XQ-appended deck copy, and now CI-gated with absolute external R/X thresholds.

yagi-5elm-51seg.description: 5-element Yagi (1 reflector + driven + 3 directors), 14.2 MHz, 0.2-lambda element spacing
yagi-5elm-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallén solver (regression reference; multi-wire RHS/endpoints fixed 2026-04-25)

external_reference_candidate.source: nec2c 1.3.1 on Arch Linux (deck copy with XQ appended)

yagi-5elm-51seg.status: Regression reference captured from corrected fnec multi-wire Hallen implementation; external candidate captured via nec2c 1.3.1 with XQ-appended deck copy and now CI-gated with conservative absolute external R/X thresholds for incremental parity tightening.

dipole-ld-loaded-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz, LD type 4 + LD type 1 feed loading
dipole-ld-loaded-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference for LD type 1 support)

external_reference_candidate.source: nec2c 1.3.1 on Arch Linux (deck copy with XQ inserted before EN)

dipole-ld-loaded-51seg.status: Regression lock for LD type 1 (parallel RLC equivalent impedance) after initial implementation. External nec2c candidate is now CI-gated with provisional absolute thresholds while parity is still being improved.

dipole-ld-series-rl-51seg.description: Half-wave dipole, free space, 51 segments, 14.2 MHz, LD type 2 series RL feed loading
dipole-ld-series-rl-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference for LD type 2 support)
dipole-ld-series-rl-51seg.status: Regression lock for LD type 2 (series RL) after initial implementation.

dipole-ld-series-rc-51seg.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference for LD type 3 support)
dipole-ld-series-rc-51seg.status: Regression lock for LD type 3 (series RC) after initial implementation.

tl-two-dipoles-linked.description: Two parallel dipoles with a lossless TL link between feed segments; one driven source
tl-two-dipoles-linked.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference for TL initial executable subset)

external_reference_candidate.source: nec2c 1.3.1 on Arch Linux (deck copy with XQ inserted before EN)

tl-two-dipoles-linked.status: Regression lock for TL execution subset (type 0, NSEG=1; explicit or segment=0-mapped endpoints). External candidate now also CI-gated with conservative absolute R/X thresholds for incremental parity tightening.

tl-two-dipoles-linked-seg0.description: Two parallel dipoles with a lossless TL link using segment=0 endpoint mapping
tl-two-dipoles-linked-seg0.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference for TL segment=0 center mapping)
tl-two-dipoles-linked-seg0.status: Regression lock for TL segment=0 endpoint mapping to tag-center segment in the initial TL execution subset.

tl-two-dipoles-linked-nseg0.description: Two parallel dipoles with a lossless TL link using NSEG=0 single-section shorthand
tl-two-dipoles-linked-nseg0.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference for TL NSEG=0 single-section shorthand)
tl-two-dipoles-linked-nseg0.status: Regression lock for TL NSEG=0 acceptance as a single-section shorthand in the initial TL execution subset.

tl-two-dipoles-linked-seg0-even52.description: Two parallel dipoles with a lossless TL link using segment=0 endpoints on even-segment wires
tl-two-dipoles-linked-seg0-even52.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference for TL segment=0 lower-center mapping on even-segment tags)
tl-two-dipoles-linked-seg0-even52.status: Regression lock for TL segment=0 mapping on even-segment tags, where fnec now deterministically chooses the lower center segment.

dipole-loaded.description: 14.2 MHz dipole driven at 7.1 MHz with top-hat loading loop
dipole-loaded.expected_hallen_error_contains: solver currently supports only collinear wire topologies aligned with the driven segment
dipole-loaded.status: Hallen path now rejects this case as unsupported because the loaded loop is non-collinear with the driven wire axis. External candidate captured via NEC2DXS500+XQ; full non-collinear solver support is still pending.

frequency-sweep-dipole.description: Half-wave dipole, frequency sweep: 10, 12, 14, 16, 18 MHz (FR step 2.0 MHz from 10.0)
frequency-sweep-dipole.status: fnec now solves all FR points and CI-gates the full sweep using Hallen regression values. External NEC2DXS500+XQ candidates are now also gated with absolute external R/X thresholds for parity tightening.

multi-source.description: Two parallel half-wave dipoles, 1 m spacing, independent 1.0 V sources at each

external_reference_candidate.source: nec2c 1.3.1 on Arch Linux (deck copy with XQ appended)

multi-source.status: Regression reference captured from fnec for both feedpoints; external candidate captured via nec2c 1.3.1 with XQ-appended deck copy and now CI-gated with conservative absolute external R/X thresholds for incremental parity tightening.

multi-source-gr-180.description: Two parallel half-wave dipoles generated from one off-axis dipole via GR 180-degree rotation
multi-source-gr-180.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference; GR geometry expansion validated against handwritten multi-source deck)
multi-source-gr-180.status: Regression reference matches the handwritten multi-source deck exactly; added to lock GR geometry expansion into corpus validation

multi-source-gm-copy.description: Two parallel half-wave dipoles generated from one seed dipole via GM translated copy
multi-source-gm-copy.reference_source: fnec Hallen solver (regression reference; GM translated-copy expansion validated against handwritten multi-source deck)
multi-source-gm-copy.status: Regression reference matches the handwritten multi-source deck exactly; added to lock GM translated-copy expansion into corpus validation
